top3.sql:
WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        mp.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 
            WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 
            WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY mp.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgWeightedScore
    FROM StyleSco...

    FROM Musical_Preferences mp

)

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        mp.StyleID,
        (SELECT StyleName FROM Musical_Styles ms WHERE ms.StyleID = mp.StyleID) AS StyleName,
        SUM(
            CASE mp.PreferenceSeq 
                WHEN 1 THEN 3 
                WHEN 2 THEN 2 
                WHEN 3 THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    GROUP BY mp.StyleID
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT CAST(SUM(TotalWeightedScore) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS Avg...

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        mp.StyleID,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 1 END) * 3 +
        COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 1 END) * 2 +
        COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 3 THEN 1 END) * 1 AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    GROUP BY mp.StyleID
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgWeightedScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
